'''âng-r-ch''' ('''kangarach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yassify|yassify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yassify|yassify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-r-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kangarach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingarach|thingarach]] || [[word:jingarach|jingarach]] || [[word:shingarach|shingarach]] || [[word:kingarach|kingarach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungarach|thuthungarach]] || [[word:jujungarach|jujungarach]] || [[word:shushungarach|shushungarach]] || [[word:kukungarach|kukungarach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungarach|thungarach]] || [[word:jungarach|jungarach]] || [[word:shungarach|shungarach]] || [[word:kungarach|kungarach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungarach|thungarach]] || [[word:jungarach|jungarach]] || [[word:shungarach|shungarach]] || [[word:kungarach|kungarach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengarach|thengarach]] || [[word:jengarach|jengarach]] || [[word:shengarach|shengarach]] || [[word:kengarach|kengarach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongarach|thothongarach]] || [[word:jojongarach|jojongarach]] || [[word:shoshongarach|shoshongarach]] || [[word:kokongarach|kokongarach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongarach|thongarach]] || [[word:jongarach|jongarach]] || [[word:shongarach|shongarach]] || [[word:kongarach|kongarach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongarach|thongarach]] || [[word:jongarach|jongarach]] || [[word:shongarach|shongarach]] || [[word:kongarach|kongarach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngarach|thĂŠngarach]] || [[word:jĂŠngarach|jĂŠngarach]] || [[word:shĂŠngarach|shĂŠngarach]] || [[word:kĂŠngarach|kĂŠngarach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangarach|thathangarach]] || [[word:jajangarach|jajangarach]] || [[word:shashangarach|shashangarach]] || [[word:kakangarach|kakangarach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangarach|thangarach]] || [[word:jangarach|jangarach]] || [[word:shangarach|shangarach]] || [[word:kangarach|kangarach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangarach|thangarach]] || [[word:jangarach|jangarach]] || [[word:shangarach|shangarach]] || [[word:kangarach|kangarach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangarach|shangarach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangarach|goshangarach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangarach|gokishangarach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangarachnĂŒ|shangarachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangarachnknĂŒ|goshangarachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangarachnĂŒ|gokishangarachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangarachshĂ«|shangarachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangarachnkshĂ«|goshangarachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangarachshĂ«|gokishangarachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangarachro|shangarachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangarachnkro|goshangarachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangarachro|gokishangarachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangarachmu|shangarachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangarachnkmu|goshangarachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangarachmu|gokishangarachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangarachsher|shangarachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangarachnksher|goshangarachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangarachsher|gokishangarachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangarachng|shangarachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangarachnkng|goshangarachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangarachng|gokishangarachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangarachya|shangarachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangarachnkya|goshangarachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangarachya|gokishangarachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangarachyam|shangarachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangarachnkyam|goshangarachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangarachyam|gokishangarachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangarachnĂŒshĂ«|shangarachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangarachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangarachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangarachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangarachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangarachnĂŒro|shangarachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangarachnknĂŒro|goshangarachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangarachnĂŒro|gokishangarachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangarachnĂŒmu|shangarachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangarachnknĂŒmu|goshangarachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangarachnĂŒmu|gokishangarachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangarachshĂ«nĂŒ|shangarachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangarachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangarachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangarachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangarachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangarachshĂ«ro|shangarachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangarachnkshĂ«ro|goshangarachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangarachshĂ«ro|gokishangarachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangarachshĂ«mu|shangarachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangarachnkshĂ«mu|goshangarachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangarachshĂ«mu|gokishangarachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangarachronĂŒ|shangarachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangarachnkronĂŒ|goshangarachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangarachronĂŒ|gokishangarachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangarachroshĂ«|shangarachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangarachnkroshĂ«|goshangarachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangarachroshĂ«|gokishangarachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangarachromu|shangarachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangarachnkromu|goshangarachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangarachromu|gokishangarachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangarachmunĂŒ|shangarachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangarachnkmunĂŒ|goshangarachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangarachmunĂŒ|gokishangarachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangarachmushĂ«|shangarachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangarachnkmushĂ«|goshangarachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangarachmushĂ«|gokishangarachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangarachmuro|shangarachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangarachnkmuro|goshangarachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangarachmuro|gokishangarachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
